title: VIB UGENT - Multi-channel Workflow Part 2
author: Opentrons
description: [This protocol performs steps 41.2-end of this SOP](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/00c517-multi/VIB-UGENT_Customized_protocol_S-trap_steps_Multi.xlsx). One reservoir well of wash buffer should be used for each column of samples. One equilibration buffer reservoir well is used per 6 columns of sample. One elution buffer reservoir well is used per elution buffer plate.
steps_raw: [This protocol performs steps 41.2-end of this SOP](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/00c517-multi/VIB-UGENT_Customized_protocol_S-trap_steps_Multi.xlsx). One reservoir well of wash buffer should be used for each column of samples. One equilibration buffer reservoir well is used per 6 columns of sample. One elution buffer reservoir well is used per elution buffer plate.
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
